leadText: Wonder Skin (Japanese: ミラクルスキン Miracle Skin) is an Ability introduced in Generation V.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] Wonder Skin lowers the accuracy of status moves used against the Pokémon with this Ability to 50%. If the move's accuracy is already 50% or less, it does not change. Other effects may still be able to modify the accuracy after Wonder Skin's effect. Wonder Skin does not affect moves without an accuracy check , or moves used by Pokémon with Mold Breaker , Teravolt , or Turboblaze . Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Wonder Skin has no effect outside of battle.

sections.title: In battle
sections.text: In battle [ edit | edit source ] Wonder Skin lowers the accuracy of status moves used against the Pokémon with this Ability to 50%. sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description MD GtI Unavailable S MD It makes it easier for the Pokémon to dodge status moves!
